name: @geckse/memory-mdvdb
description: mdvdb-backed long-term memory plugin for OpenClaw with hybrid search, time decay, and link boosting

scripts.dev:install: openclaw plugins install --link . && openclaw config set plugins.slots.memory memory-mdvdb
scripts.dev:uninstall: openclaw plugins uninstall memory-mdvdb && openclaw config unset plugins.slots.memory
scripts.dev:disable: openclaw config unset plugins.slots.memory && openclaw plugins disable memory-mdvdb
scripts.dev:enable: openclaw config set plugins.slots.memory memory-mdvdb && openclaw plugins enable memory-mdvdb
